 1298 +

 1299 + **Live-writes execution: DEFERRED to Tue Apr 14** per Steven's call (it was past midnight). Batch 1 (Monday) sits in state file as pending; tomorrow's `--execute` runs Tuesday's batch first. O

 + ptional `--force-day 2026-04-13` picks up Monday first if Steven wants it caught up.

 1300 +

 1301 + ### Session 61 lessons (load-bearing for S62+)

 1302 +

 1303 + - **The ephemeral-script pattern IS the amnesia.** Sessions 38 + 43 each built POST /prospects + POST /sequenceStates inline, ran once, threw away. Every subsequent session re-derived it. Rule

 + 18 now requires grep + git log + SCOUT_CAPABILITIES check before writing any new prospect-add one-shot. The fix is structural: library code + capability inventory + SessionStart hook all forc

 + e the prior work into current-session context.

 1304 + - **CLAUDE.md trim moves institutional memory out of the auto-loaded context window.** Session 53 + 58 extracted SCOUT_REFERENCE and SCOUT_RULES. Both are load-bearing but NOT auto-loaded. The

 + new SessionStart hook is the forcing function for the capabilities index; it can be trivially extended to also cat SCOUT_RULES or SCOUT_REFERENCE if future sessions show they're needed in con

 + text too.

 1305 + - **Code enforcement beats process rules wherever possible.** Rule 17 (timezone) is enforced by `validate_prospect_inputs` refusing to fire on empty/invalid IANA, NOT by "remember to populate

 + the field." Same meta-principle as `feedback_code_enforcement_beats_process_rules.md`. The amnesia fix is hybrid: structural (library code + inventory + hook) for what can be automated, proces

 + s rule (Rule 18) for the judgment call before writing new code.

 1306 + - **Never show Outreach backend numeric IDs to Steven.** He reads `prospect_id=669325, sequence 2013, mailbox 11` as pure noise. Rule 19 requires translating at the presentation boundary. Raw

 + IDs stay in function return dicts for downstream API calls, never in chat.

 1307 + - **`raw_pages` is an extraction-REQUEST list, not a page list.** Multiple entries per URL are intentional. URL-based dedup is lossy. Round 1.1 needs content-MERGE, not dedup.

 1308 + - **Stop-on-first-failure is the right rule for Level 3 validation.** Saved ~$8 + ~60 min by not running 4 more A/B tests that would have failed the same way. Mechanical failure modes don't ne

 + ed N data points to confirm.

 1309 + - **Level 2 pre-merge checks catch pure regressions; Level 3 A/B checks catch design failures.** Part 0 passed Level 2 (stash → run → unstash → diff on Waverly, 37/37 preserved). Part 1 flags

 + failed Level 3 because the flag design was wrong, not because it regressed existing code. Both layers matter; one is not a substitute for the other.

 1310 + - **Ship with flags OFF by default.** Failed flags stay dark with zero production risk. The next session can iterate on flag behavior without reverting or re-shipping.

 1311 + - **Canary with IANA-reserved `.test` TLD is the safe first-write pattern.** `codecombat.test` will never resolve, so even if a canary prospect triggers a send, no email leaves the system. Cle

 + aner than using Steven's real address.

 1312 +

 1313 + ### Session 61 carryover → Session 62+

 1314 +

 1315 + 1. **PRIMARY — run `scripts/diocesan_drip.py --execute` Tuesday morning.** Tuesday's 17-contact batch, ~2.7 hours wall clock, 5-15 min jittered sleeps. Resumable on crash. Audit log at `data/d

 + iocesan_drip_audit.jsonl`. If Monday catch-up desired, `--force-day 2026-04-13` first.

 1316 + 2. **Wednesday + Thursday** `--execute` once each.

 1317 + 3. **Friday** `--verify` + session wrap.

 1318 + 4. **Research Engine Round 1.1 planning** — separate plan-mode session. Per-URL content MERGE is the most promising lever.

 1319 + 5. **BUG 5 code fix** in `tools/research_engine.py::_target_match_params`. Shared-city gap. Plan-mode session.

 1320 + 6. **9 pending dioceses review** — Pittsburgh/OKC/Omaha contamination risk. Blocked on BUG 5.

 1321 + 7. **OPTIONAL:** F9 compliance scanner query redesign, LA archdiocese research restart, IN/OK/TN CSTA hand-curation.

 1322 + 8. **FUTURE:** wire `prospect_loader.execute_load_plan` into `_on_prospect_research_complete` so research-complete callbacks auto-load prospects into campaign sequences.

 diocesan-drip-amnesia-fix

 Session 61 summary

 What we did:

 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── diocesan-drip-amnesia-fix ──

 1. Research Engine Round 1 (4 commits) — shipped but parked. Part 0 shared dedup fix, three feature flags ( enable_url_dedup , l15_step5_skip_threshold , log_claude_usage ), A/B harness with real token-count cost
 measurement. Level 3 Waverly A/B failed the 95% verified quality gate (v1=30 verified vs v2=22). Root cause: URL dedup collapses distinct per-query Serper snippet highlighting. Round 1.1 needs content MERGE
 instead of dedup. Flags default OFF, production untouched, 21 tests green, ~$4 budget burned.

 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── diocesan-drip-amnesia-fix ──

 2. Diocesan drip library (Commit A). Promoted the Sessions 38+43 ephemeral POST /prospects + POST /sequenceStates patterns to canonical library code: validate_prospect_inputs , create_prospect ,
 find_prospect_by_email , add_prospect_to_sequence in tools/outreach_client.py ; new tools/timezone_lookup.py ; new tools/prospect_loader.py reusable bulk loader; new scripts/diocesan_drip.py thin CLI with 5
 subcommands; 15 unit tests (29 total green).

 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── diocesan-drip-amnesia-fix ──

 3. Amnesia root-cause fix (Commit B). New docs/SCOUT_CAPABILITIES.md inventory auto-injected via SessionStart hook in ~/.claude/settings.json . CLAUDE.md PREFLIGHT: Prospect add to sequence + Rule 17
 (code-enforced timezone) + Rule 18 (no ephemeral prospect scripts).

 diocesan-drip-amnesia-fix

 4. Rule 19 (never show Outreach backend IDs in chat) after you called out the noise in my canary summary. Translation table banked.

 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── diocesan-drip-amnesia-fix ──

 5. Diocesan drip assigned. 63 contacts across Mon–Thu (17/17/15/14), round-robin by diocese, VERIFIED first. Canary verified clean and rolled back. Ready to execute.
